summary: Live market data caching not flushing on quote update
description:
Sensex / Nifty / individual stock quotes in the ET Markets section lag by 2-5 minutes during the morning session (09:15 - 11:00 IST). Caching layer in app v5.7.x does not always invalidate when an upstream quote update arrives.

Fix: switch to push-based cache invalidation via the existing socket channel; remove the 60s TTL in favour of explicit ttl-on-receive.
